div1.entryFree:
Curl, vb. 1) tr. to form into ringlets: his --ed hair, Lucr. 981. a --ed pate, H5 V, 2, 169. Lr. III, 4, 88. the wealthy --ed darlings of our nation, Oth. I, 2, 68. the --ed Antony, Ant. V, 2, 304. Used of clouds: to ride on the --ed clouds, Tp. I, 2, 192. Of waves: --ing their monstrous heads, H4B III, 1, 23. swell the --ed waters, Lr. III, 1, 6.
2) intr. to form ringlets: it will not c. by nature, Tw. I, 3, 105.
